principle: Every executor uses the same Stage4 skill package, DAG, parent runtime, generated thin child code, grey gates, and packaging contract. Quality is enforced by executable gates, not by model identity.
allowed_variation: field key tuple overrides in GeneratedDatasetAdapter
template enablement according to GT support and Stage1 capability plan
custom BenchmarkTemplate subclasses only when they pass the same contract gates
forbidden_variation: different skill package for different models
copying the full parent runtime into generated child code
letting local qwen or any LLM change DAG nodes thresholds schemas scoring policy or hidden-answer rules
generating audit_format and EVALSET_DATASET from different item samples
copying LIBERO or UAV task taxonomy into unrelated data sources instead of deriving templates from current evidence
relaxing schema or media checks based on executor capability
using model identity to decide quality thresholds
leaking answer metadata or GT provenance in model-facing data/test.jsonl
minimum_completion_evidence: self_test/dry_run_items.jsonl has at least one row
invalid_item_screening/valid_items.jsonl has at least one row
perfect scoring smoke is full score and negative smoke is lower
data_22_full_benchmark_dataset/audit_format/benchmark_items.jsonl has rows with answer provenance and quality_flags
data/test.jsonl contains no answer metadata evidence_refs gt_* or gold_* keys
images media ground_truth metrics are non-empty
